channel.title: Template-Injection on Classroom
channel.description: Recent content in Template-Injection on Classroom

item.title: TryHackMe Server-side Template Injection (SSTI)
item.description: TryHackMe SSTI room walkthrough — understanding Server-Side Template Injection, detecting template engines, exploiting Smarty/Pug/Jinja2/Twig, and mitigation strategies.
